renames.rationale: Returns one of {object,array,string,boolean,discarded,number} string literals; matches nlohmann::json::type_name() signature. Called from many JSON helpers in this module.
Embeds nlohmann/json 3.7.0 commit hash '961c151d...3.7.0' and calls _CxxThrowException; classic json::exception::create/parse_error builder.
Calls fwrite via guard_dispatch_icall; wrapped by callers that subsequently call fclose (FUN_14001d9d0). File-stream write helper.
Calls FUN_14001d7d0 (fwrite helper) then fclose; matches close-and-flush pattern for buffered output stream wrapper.
Calls _get_stream_buffer_pointers (MSVC CRT internal for stream buffer state); file-stream buffer peek/access helper.
